# Calkilo

> Calkilo is a mobile nutrition app for AI calorie tracking, photo food logging, macro tracking, and meal planning.

## Product summary
- Product type: AI calorie tracker and nutrition app
- Platforms: iOS and Android
- Core use cases: photo calorie estimation, macro tracking, daily nutrition logging, meal planning, progress tracking
- Integrations: Apple Health, Google Fit, Fitbit, Samsung Health

## Canonical pages
- Home: https://calkilo.com/
- AI calorie tracker: https://calkilo.com/ai-calorie-tracker/
- Photo calorie calculator: https://calkilo.com/photo-calorie-calculator/
- Macro tracker: https://calkilo.com/macro-tracker/
- FAQ: https://calkilo.com/faq/
- Contact: https://calkilo.com/contact/
- Privacy policy: https://calkilo.com/privacy-policy/

## Store links
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.calkilo.mobile&hl=fa
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/calkilo-ai-calorie-counter/id6755718411

## Support
- Contact support: https://calkilo.com/contact/
- Account deletion: https://calkilo.com/account-deletion/
